findings.title: Pipeline Consolidation Summary
findings.description: Consolidated 41 findings from 7 agents into 32 unique findings. Removed 9 duplicates. Identified 2 cross-agent conflicts.

findings.title: Top Priority Findings
findings.description: Highest priority items based on weighted scoring (user_impact×0.35 + business_value×0.30) / (effort×0.20 + risk×0.15): Primary KPI: Unsubscribe Rate (score=3.37); North Star Metric: User Engagement (score=3.162); PushFlow's Strong Delivery Metrics (score=3.129); Monitor Notification Delivery Performance (score=3.129); Primary KPI: Notification Click-Through Rate (CTR) (score=3.059)

findings.title: Cross-Agent Conflict Resolution Report
findings.description: Resolved 2 conflicts between agent findings. requirements-002 vs risk-002: Fixing silent notification failures on Android 14 is critical, but the current delivery failure poses a critical risk to user engagement.; requirements-010 vs risk-003: Documenting compliance for the notification system includes accessibility considerations, but users are currently facing accessibility challenges.

evidence.excerpt: Fixing silent notification failures on Android 14 is critical, but the current delivery failure poses a critical risk to user engagement.
Documenting compliance for the notification system includes accessibility considerations, but users are currently facing accessibility challenges.

conflicts.description: Fixing silent notification failures on Android 14 is critical, but the current delivery failure poses a critical risk to user engagement.
conflicts.resolution: Prioritize the resolution of silent notification failures on Android 14 as an immediate action to mitigate the critical risk.
conflicts.reasoning: Addressing the delivery failure is essential for user retention and engagement, and it must be prioritized to comply with the critical risk policy.

conflicts.description: Documenting compliance for the notification system includes accessibility considerations, but users are currently facing accessibility challenges.
conflicts.resolution: Simultaneously document compliance and implement immediate accessibility improvements to address user challenges.
conflicts.reasoning: While compliance documentation is necessary, it should not delay the implementation of accessibility improvements that directly affect user experience.

summary: Consolidated 41 findings into 32 unique items. Removed 9 duplicates, resolved 2 conflicts. Top priority: Primary KPI: Unsubscribe Rate.
